data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified merge commit d130837dbc21 is present on main, knot tags include implementation commit b9588b890c8a and merge commit d130837dbc21, and focused regression tests passed for main_tests::maybe_run_self_command_upgrade_hint_tracks_hook_health and self_manage::tests::upgrade_summary_omits_hint_when_not_needed. GitHub Actions shows successful main pipeline runs after merge; no regressions found in the shipped upgrade-hook hint behavior.
